## Type of change

## Summary
<!-- What changed and why. 2–5 sentences. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Lint is clean (`uv run ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Format is clean (`uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Manually ran `python -m sudoku_solver` and verified animation
- [ ] README setup steps still accurate
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
